steps.title: Identify the logical shift
steps.content: The first sentence states Sauer challenged prevailing views. The second sentence explains what his specific alternative position was. The key signal: the movement from general challenge to specific details.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content:
Specifically signals that the second sentence provides concrete details about what the first sentence mentioned more generally.
The other three choices suggest relationships that don't fit: Similarly implies parallel ideas, Therefore implies consequence, and Finally implies sequence.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
